_comments.seed: A label stored with every record to identify this data source. Change this if you run multiple instances.
_comments.string_length: Number of characters in each generated random string.
_comments.string_charset: Character set to use. Options: alphanumeric, alpha, digits, hex, printable.
_comments.schedule: CRON expression for the timer trigger. Must match the SCHEDULE app setting. Default: every 10 minutes.
